description: User can register a new account
steps: Navigate to /signup
Enter a valid email and a password (>= 8 characters)
Click the 'Create Account' button
Confirm the page redirects to /welcome
Confirm a new row exists in the users table
Confirm a verification email is received (check mailcatcher or mock)
notes: The minimum password length may change later; that does not affect this feature's steps.

steps: Precondition: a registered user exists (use feat-001 flow or a fixture)
Navigate to /login
Enter valid credentials and click 'Sign In'
Confirm the page redirects to /dashboard
Confirm the cookie / token is set
Refresh the page and confirm the user remains logged in

description: Login page renders correctly on mobile
steps: Set Playwright viewport to 375x667 (iPhone SE)
Take a screenshot of /login
Confirm the form is centered, the button is not occluded, and text does not overflow
Repeat with viewport 1440x900
Compare against baseline screenshots if they exist
notes: Visual task — use screenshots and multimodal review.

steps: Run hey/wrk against /api/login with 500 concurrent requests
Check p95 latency
If above 200ms, profile to find the bottleneck
